# Chapter 12: PDEs: heat, wave, Laplace  (~120 pp)
- 12.1 Why distributed phenomena need PDEs (12)
- 12.2 The heat equation (18)
- 12.3 The wave equation (18)
- 12.4 Laplace's equation (15)
- 12.5 Separation of variables, Fourier series introduction (18)
- 12.6 Boundary and initial conditions: the engineer's craft (15)
- 12.7 Numerical PDEs: finite difference, finite element preview (15)
- 12.8 Failure section: ill-posed problems and the cost of bad boundary conditions (9)

**Archetype**: transport, stability. **Project**: solve the 1D heat equation in a rod numerically; compare to analytical solution. **Exercises**: 35.
